mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment ( bid_idx, mem_idx, payment_key, order_id, pay_method, pay_amount, pay_status, buyer_name, buyer_tel, buyer_addr, buyer_zipcode, pay_regdate ) VALUES ( #{bidIdx}, #{memIdx}, #{paymentKey}, #{orderId}, #{payMethod}, #{payAmount}, 'READY', #{buyerName}, #{buyerTel}, #{buyerAddr}, #{buyerZipcode}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE payment SET pay_status = 'DONE' WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE payment SET confirmed_at = NOW(), pay_status = 'CONFIRMED' WHERE bid_idx = #{bidIdx}
UPDATE payment SET pay_status = 'CANCELED', canceled_at = CASE WHEN canceled_at IS NULL THEN NOW() ELSE canceled_at END WHERE bid_idx = #{bidIdx} AND pay_status = 'DONE'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment WHERE bid_idx = #{bidIdx} AND pay_status IN ('DONE', 'CONFIRMED') LIMIT 1
